headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日娱乐热点
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周新片仅两部。《痴迷》《鬼上车》等影视作品占据热搜，行业聚焦流媒体新作与续集动态。
summaryEn: No new movies released today, only two this week. Titles like 'Obsession' and 'Ghost Car' dominate trends, with industry focus on streaming hits and sequels.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片仅两部，市场冷清
industryHighlights.en: Only two new movies this week, quiet market

industryHighlights.text: 《末日地堡》持续入榜，科幻热度不减
《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档，漫威宇宙再扩容
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Fresh New Day' dated, MCU expands
